And SEO to death and just launch, launch, launch.

Certainly, there could be results that come from that, but what we found is if you don't have the surrounding parts of a strategy that helps be mindful of that journey of your customers and how to touch those different points and how to really meet them where they're at, you may drive a lot of traffic, but ultimately, there's going to be a point where that traffic's not going to be converting super well, and it's not going to be as stable a traffic that's going to compound over time.

So really trying to take those learnings here, and that is what enabled us to start building our own platform where we really started to break down, again, as I mentioned, those different jobs to be done into workflows, and these workflows really enable us to represent, these are workflows represented in code and allow us to plug into different APIs as needed.

The whole framework, the workflow itself, it largely maintains.
